privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 100% synthetic battery telemetry data generated by Python code using Django ORM. Exactly 50 FlightLog records are created with deterministic random seeding (seed 42), with a 30% probability each of having critical battery levels (BATT_END values 1-14) or safe levels (15-80). Each log contains a raw_log text field with BATT_END formatted as 'BATT_END:{value}'. The critical battery threshold is strictly less than 15. The agent must extract BATT_END values from raw_log text fields and produce a CSV report at /home/ga/Documents/critical_battery_report.csv matching the header 'flight_log_id,batt_end_value'. The ground truth file is stored at /var/lib/aerobridge/battery_ground_truth.csv. The data source is an Aerobridge Django application database (SQLite) accessed via http://localhost:8000.
